Notice Of Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And For Dismissal Of Prana Nine Properties, Llc
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Gentile of the Law Offices of Thomas O'Hagan (510.587.1603) for defendant R & R French Bros.
G. Randy Kasten of Vogl & Meredith (398.0200) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PRANA NINE PROPERTIES LLC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT WITH PLAINTIFF LISA RAMSEY AND FOR DISMISSAL OF PRANA NINE PROPERTIES, LLC is granted. The record reflects comparative fault on the part of plaintiff and an alternative cause for much of her medical specials. Plaintiff's general damage claim is unrealistic. The settlement meets the Tech-Built criteria for a good faith settlement. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
